title: rE-oCd
description: An unofficial continuation of FVDisco's oCd resource pack.
body:
Miss oCd? Get rE-oCd Pack!! (100.00% complete! ^^) **26.1 ready!** (Place in your resourcepacks folder) This is an **UNOFFICIAL** continuation of [disco_](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/disco_/)'s [oCd resource pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ocd-pack/), intending to oCd-fy all the blocks added in 1.9 and onwards up to the most recent Minecraft version without modifying the base pack (heavily). This resource pack aims to texture the blocks and some block entities like signs, boats, and Shulkers only. If you wish to have an even more simplistic experience, I recommend using [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones), or any other simplistic resource pack on top of this one. - Semi-Disco-fied. - Highly simplified. - Slightly stylized. - Obsessive, Compulsive; and not the least bit Disordered. The pack also aims to keep its style as Vanilla as possible, just like how disco_ intended it to be. - No noise. - No harsh colors. - All angles @ 90 degrees. - (Almost) All spacing even... OCD even.* *Some compromises had to be made for certain textures. **The screenshots taken for the showcase use the [rE-oCd Emissive add-on](https://www.dropbox.com/s/1wnbw0ngbdsgw30/rE-oCd-emissive.zip?dl=1). The add-on requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to be installed (Continuity requires [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)).** ![rE-oCd Resource Pack 26.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7433fdea2d6b9c5b35c55855f25413e92415b73f.png) ## For the Bedrock port of this pack, click [here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/slhajg6gmeaqowdapilq9/AEhS6N8KCTOWB0_PsudyDcg?rlkey=t5hdcdhx50rm09cnd54x7v58u&st=uur5qzxh&dl=0)! **(Keep in mind the Bedrock port is not being actively mantained, updates will come out slower for this version.)** [Twitter](https://twitter.com/HoshinekoSanti) [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/hoshinekosanti) [VGen](https://vgen.co/HoshinekoSanti)

### Additional Notes
If you use this resource pack on YouTube, please add a link to disco_'s pack first then this pack last, as this pack is a direct port of his original work. I do not own any of the assets besides the ones I've personally made.

**Thank you disco_ for inspiring me to continue your pack, I hope you're doing well wherever you are right now in life. :)**
